meaning: The creator and ruler of the universe and source of all moral authority.
The central figure of Christianity, the son of God.
The Christian scriptures, consisting of the Old and New Testaments.
A solemn request for help or expression of thanks addressed to God.
Strong belief in the doctrines of a religion, based on spiritual conviction rather than proof.
The free and unmerited favor of God, as manifested in the salvation of sinners.
Compassion or forgiveness shown toward someone whom it is within one's power to punish or harm.
The non-physical part of a person which is the seat of emotions and character.
Freedom from disturbance; tranquility.
The quality or state of being true.
The natural agent that stimulates sight and makes things visible.
The condition that distinguishes animals and plants from inorganic matter.
An intense feeling of deep affection.
The center of a person's thoughts and emotions.
The realm over which God reigns.
A person who tends and rears sheep.
A personal follower of Jesus during his life.
Each of the twelve chief disciples of Jesus Christ.
Stop feeling angry or resentful toward someone for an offense.
The feeling or expression of reverence and adoration for a deity.
